title: Studio Console
summary: Dense workbench shell with character cues reduced to compact chrome, teal command affordances, and controlled warm-magenta emphasis.

seedMaterial.usage: Exploratory cue reference only; no logo source or final mark is redistributed by this descriptor.

presentation.layout: compact split registry and suite shell
presentation.chrome: flat panels, small badges, strong table/list density
presentation.markTreatment: tiny glasses/bow cue or monogram slot, not the detailed character image
risks: can become too utilitarian if the character cue is removed entirely
needs a production small mark before package badges use it

contrastTargets: foreground/background remains inherited from the factory semantic pairs
accent is selected for AA non-text and large-control use against the warm light background
